title: 标准 MHA 的 NPU 内核与状态机：AscendAttentionBackendImpl
thesis: 一个标准（非 MLA）注意力后端在昇腾 NPU 上『用一台五态机决定走哪条 torch_npu 算子路径』——把 vLLM 基座 FlashAttention 的 flash_attn_varlen_func / reshape_and_cache_flash 这两条 CUDA 内核，逐一换成 torch_npu 的 paged / fused-infer / reshape-and-cache 算子；workspace 预取是 NPU 算子相对 CUDA 内核的特有节拍。本章是 ch18 选定的 AscendAttentionBackend 的 impl_cls；并在 get_impl_cls/get_builder_cls 的 enable_cp() 分支处回收伏笔 f7（CP 组排布运行期分流在此收口）。
code_spine: vllm_ascend/attention/attention_v1.py:L73-L141  AscendAttentionBackend：@register_backend 注册进 vLLM；get_impl_cls/get_builder_cls 按 enable_cp() 分流（f7 收口）；get_kv_cache_shape=(2,num_blocks,block_size,num_kv_heads,head_size)
vllm_ascend/attention/attention_v1.py:L143-L148  AscendAttentionState(Enum) 五态：PrefillNoCache=0 / PrefillCacheHit=1 / DecodeOnly=2 / ChunkedPrefill=3 / SpecDecoding=4
vllm_ascend/attention/attention_v1.py:L151-L210  AscendMetadata 数据类：attn_state + slot_mapping + block_tables + seq_lens 家族 + actual_seq_lengths_q + 各计数
vllm_ascend/attention/utils.py:L273-L315  split_decodes_and_prefills：在已重排的 batch 上找 decode|prefill 分界，返回 (num_decodes,num_prefills,num_decode_tokens,num_prefill_tokens)
vllm_ascend/attention/attention_v1.py:L272-L332  AscendAttentionMetadataBuilder.build：拆批 + 取 slot_mapping/block_table + 装 attn_mask + H2D query_start_loc → 组装 AscendMetadata
vllm_ascend/attention/attention_v1.py:L334-L354  build_for_graph_capture：图捕获分支（只对 DecodeOnly/ChunkedPrefill/SpecDecoding 造 dummy metadata）
vllm_ascend/attention/attention_v1.py:L1229-L1256  reshape_and_cache → DeviceOperator.reshape_and_cache → torch_npu._npu_reshape_and_cache（KV 写回分页 cache）
vllm_ascend/attention/attention_v1.py:L1258-L1277  forward_impl：按 attn_state==DecodeOnly && using_paged_attention && 无 SWA → forward_paged_attention，否则 forward_fused_infer_attention
vllm_ascend/attention/attention_v1.py:L922-L983  full_graph_pa：图捕获下 _npu_paged_attention_get_workspace 预取 + _npu_paged_attention（workspace 预取节拍范例）
vllm_ascend/attention/attention_v1.py:L1346-L1783  AscendC8AttentionBackendImpl（INT8 KV 量化子类，减法候选/选讲）

elide: swap_blocks/copy_blocks（L110-L136，KV 块搬运/拷贝的纯索引赋值，非注意力前向主线）
get_supported_kernel_block_sizes 返回 [128]（L138-L140，供 builder 算 max_num_blocks_per_req）

embed_excerpts.code:
class AscendAttentionState(Enum):
    PrefillNoCache = 0
    PrefillCacheHit = 1
    DecodeOnly = 2
    ChunkedPrefill = 3
    SpecDecoding = 4

# **************************** Basic Properties ************************** #
    attn_mask: torch.Tensor | None = None
    # Current state of this attention run.
    attn_state: AscendAttentionState = AscendAttentionState.ChunkedPrefill

    # Number of tokens excluding padding.
    num_actual_tokens_pcp_padded: int = 0
    num_actual_tokens: int = 0
    num_decode_tokens: int = 0
    num_prefills: int = 0
    num_decodes: int = 0

    seq_lens: torch.Tensor = None
    seq_lens_cpu: torch.Tensor = None
    seq_lens_list: list[int] = None  # type: ignore
    actual_seq_lengths_q: list[int] = None  # type: ignore

    query_start_loc: torch.Tensor = None
    # Maximum query length in the batch (None for decoding).
    max_query_len: int | None = None

    # ********************** KV Cache Related Properties ********************* #
    # Block addresses per sequence (Seq id -> list of physical block).
    # (batch_size, max_blocks_per_seq)
    block_tables: torch.Tensor = None

    # The indices of the token slots that input tokens will be stored into.
    # E.g., if `slot_mapping` is [35, 2, 17] and the block size is 16, the
    # three tokens are stored in the 3rd slot in block 2, 2nd slot in block 0,
    # and 1st slot in block 1, respectively.
    # (num_tokens,)
    slot_mapping: torch.Tensor = None
    # pcp
    prefill: AscendMetadataForPrefill | None = None
    # dcp
    decode_meta: AscendMetadataForDecode | None = None

    causal: bool = True
    # runner_type in model_config.
    model_runner_type: str = ""
elide: dataclass 头部注释 + 部分冗余 seq_lens 字段注释（L151-L159、L172-L186）
reshape_cache_event / kvcomp_metadata 字段（L207-L210，KV 传输事件与 hamming 稀疏元数据，非主线）

embed_excerpts.code:
def split_decodes_and_prefills(
    common_attn_metadata: AscendCommonAttentionMetadata,
    decode_threshold: int = 1,
) -> tuple[int, int, int, int]:
    """
    Assuming a reordered batch, finds the boundary between prefill and decode
    requests.
    ...
    """
    long_seq_metadata = common_attn_metadata.prefill_context_parallel_metadata
    query_lens_pcp_full = long_seq_metadata.query_lens_pcp_full_cpu if long_seq_metadata else None
    max_query_len_pcp_full = long_seq_metadata.max_query_len_pcp_full if long_seq_metadata else 0
    max_query_len = common_attn_metadata.max_query_len if max_query_len_pcp_full == 0 else max_query_len_pcp_full
    num_reqs = common_attn_metadata.num_reqs
    num_tokens = common_attn_metadata.num_actual_tokens
    query_start_loc = common_attn_metadata.query_start_loc_cpu

    if max_query_len <= decode_threshold:
        return num_reqs, 0, num_tokens, 0

    query_lens = (query_start_loc[1:] - query_start_loc[:-1]) if query_lens_pcp_full is None else query_lens_pcp_full
    is_prefill = query_lens > decode_threshold
    if not torch.any(is_prefill):
        return num_reqs, 0, num_tokens, 0

    first_prefill = is_prefill.int().argmax(dim=-1).item()
    num_decodes = first_prefill
    num_prefills = num_reqs - num_decodes
    num_decode_tokens = query_start_loc[first_prefill].item()
    num_prefill_tokens = num_tokens - num_decode_tokens
    return (num_decodes, num_prefills, num_decode_tokens, num_prefill_tokens)
elide: docstring 中间说明（保留首尾意思即可）
PCP 分支：query_lens_pcp_full 仅在 prefill_context_parallel 时非 None，非主线可一句带过（回指 ch08）

embed_excerpts.code:
def build(
        self,
        common_prefix_len: int,
        common_attn_metadata: AscendCommonAttentionMetadata,
        fast_build: bool = False,
    ) -> AscendMetadata:
        num_reqs = common_attn_metadata.num_reqs
        num_actual_tokens = common_attn_metadata.num_actual_tokens
        query_start_loc_cpu = common_attn_metadata.query_start_loc_cpu[: num_reqs + 1]

        num_decodes, num_prefills, num_decode_tokens, num_prefill_tokens = split_decodes_and_prefills(
            common_attn_metadata, decode_threshold=self.decode_threshold
        )

        block_table = common_attn_metadata.block_table_tensor
        if common_attn_metadata._seq_lens_cpu is not None:
            seq_lens = common_attn_metadata._seq_lens_cpu[:num_reqs]
        elif common_attn_metadata.seq_lens_cpu is not None:
            seq_lens = common_attn_metadata.seq_lens_cpu[:num_reqs]
        else:
            seq_lens = common_attn_metadata.seq_lens[:num_reqs].to("cpu")

        slot_mapping = common_attn_metadata.slot_mapping[:num_actual_tokens]
        attn_state = common_attn_metadata.attn_state

        # Get attn_mask from singleton AttentionMaskBuilder
        attn_mask = self.attn_mask_builder.get_attention_mask(common_attn_metadata.causal, self.model_config)

        # TODO: Yet another unnecessary H2D while we already have a query_start_loc on device
        query_start_loc = query_start_loc_cpu.pin_memory().to(self.device, non_blocking=True)

        attn_metadata = AscendMetadata(
            num_actual_tokens=num_actual_tokens,
            num_decode_tokens=num_decode_tokens,
            block_tables=block_table,
            query_start_loc=query_start_loc,
            seq_lens=seq_lens,
            seq_lens_cpu=seq_lens,
            seq_lens_list=seq_lens.tolist(),
            max_query_len=common_attn_metadata.max_query_len,
            actual_seq_lengths_q=query_start_loc_cpu[1:].tolist(),
            slot_mapping=slot_mapping,
            attn_mask=attn_mask,
            attn_state=attn_state,
            num_prefills=num_prefills,
            num_decodes=num_decodes,
            causal=common_attn_metadata.causal,
            model_runner_type=self.model_config.runner_type,
            kvcomp_metadata=common_attn_metadata.kvcomp_metadata,
        )
        return attn_metadata
elide: CrossAttentionSpec / parallel_drafting 对 seq_lens·slot_mapping 的覆盖分支（L297-L304，encoder-decoder / 并行草稿特例）

embed_excerpts.code:
def forward(
        self,
        layer: AttentionLayer,
        query: torch.Tensor,
        key: torch.Tensor,
        value: torch.Tensor,
        kv_cache: tuple[torch.Tensor],
        attn_metadata: AscendMetadata,
        output: torch.Tensor | None = None,
        output_scale: torch.Tensor | None = None,
        output_block_scale: torch.Tensor | None = None,
    ) -> torch.Tensor:
        """Forward pass with Ascend attention.
        Args:
            query: shape = [num_tokens, num_heads, head_size]
            key: shape = [num_tokens, num_kv_heads, head_size]
            value: shape = [num_tokens, num_kv_heads, head_size]
            kv_cache: shape =
                [2, num_blocks, block_size, num_kv_heads, head_size]
            attn_metadata: Metadata for attention.
        Returns:
            shape = [num_tokens, num_heads * head_size]
        """
        assert output is not None, "Output tensor must be provided."
        ...
        assert layer._k_scale_float == 1.0 and layer._v_scale_float == 1.0
        num_tokens = query.shape[0]
        if attn_metadata is None:
            return output.fill_(0)

        # Initialize key_cache and value_cache from kv_cache if not already set.
        if self.key_cache is None and kv_cache is not None:
            if (
                isinstance(kv_cache, torch.Tensor)
                and kv_cache.dim() > 0
                and kv_cache.shape[0] == 2
                or isinstance(kv_cache, (list, tuple))
                and len(kv_cache) >= 2
            ):
                self.key_cache, self.value_cache = kv_cache[0], kv_cache[1]

        output_padded = None
        if key is not None and value is not None:
            output_padded = output
            query, key, value, output_padded = self.reshape_and_cache(
                query, key, value, kv_cache, attn_metadata, output
            )
        # pooling model branch
        if attn_metadata.model_runner_type == "pooling" and not attn_metadata.causal:
            attn_output = self._forward_encoder_attention(query, key, value, attn_metadata, output)
            output[:num_tokens] = attn_output[:num_tokens]
            return output
        if output_padded is not None:
            attn_output = self.forward_impl(query, key, value, kv_cache, attn_metadata, output_padded)
        else:
            attn_output = self.forward_impl(query, key, value, kv_cache, attn_metadata, output)
        output[:num_tokens] = attn_output[:num_tokens]
        return output
elide: enable_hamming_sparse 取 layerIndex（L1303-L1304，hamming 稀疏专用，默认关）
fused output quantization 的 NotImplementedError 守卫（L1306-L1307）
省略号处为上述两段守卫

embed_excerpts.code:
def reshape_and_cache(
        self,
        query: torch.Tensor,
        key: torch.Tensor,
        value: torch.Tensor,
        kv_cache: tuple[torch.Tensor],
        attn_metadata: AscendMetadata,
        output: torch.Tensor,
    ):
        if len(kv_cache) > 1:
            if self.is_kv_producer:
                attn_metadata.reshape_cache_event = torch.npu.Event()
            if self.key_cache is None:
                self.key_cache, self.value_cache = kv_cache[0], kv_cache[1]
            slots = attn_metadata.slot_mapping
            encoder_decoder = self.attn_type == AttentionType.ENCODER_DECODER
            DeviceOperator.reshape_and_cache(
                key=key[: attn_metadata.num_actual_tokens] if not encoder_decoder else key,
                value=value[: attn_metadata.num_actual_tokens] if not encoder_decoder else value,
                key_cache=self.key_cache,
                value_cache=self.value_cache,
                slot_mapping=slots[: attn_metadata.num_actual_tokens] if not encoder_decoder else slots.to(torch.int32),
            )
            if self.is_kv_producer:
                attn_metadata.reshape_cache_event.record()
        return query, key, value, output
elide: is_kv_producer 的 KV 传输事件 record（disaggregated PD 场景，可一句带过）
DeviceOperator 是按设备型号选适配器的别名；A5 等另有特化（L787 起），主线落到 BaseDeviceAdaptor 这条

embed_excerpts.code:
def forward_impl(
        self,
        query: torch.Tensor,
        key: torch.Tensor,
        value: torch.Tensor,
        kv_cache: tuple[torch.Tensor],
        attn_metadata: AscendMetadata,
        output: torch.Tensor,
    ):
        num_tokens = query.shape[0]
        if (
            attn_metadata.attn_state == AscendAttentionState.DecodeOnly
            and using_paged_attention(num_tokens, self.vllm_config)
            and self.sliding_window is None
        ):
            output = self.forward_paged_attention(query, attn_metadata, output)
        else:
            output = self.forward_fused_infer_attention(query, key, value, attn_metadata, output, kv_cache)

        return output

def forward_paged_attention(
        self,
        query: torch.Tensor,
        attn_metadata: AscendMetadata,
        output: torch.Tensor | None = None,
    ) -> torch.Tensor:
        if _EXTRA_CTX.capturing:
            return self.full_graph_pa(query, attn_metadata, output)
        torch_npu._npu_paged_attention(
            query=query,
            key_cache=self.key_cache,
            value_cache=self.value_cache,
            num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            scale_value=self.scale,
            block_table=attn_metadata.block_tables,
            context_lens=attn_metadata.seq_lens,
            out=output,
        )
        return output
elide: _EXTRA_CTX.capturing 时走 full_graph_pa（图捕获路径，见 workspace 预取片段）

embed_excerpts.code:
def _get_fia_params(self, key: torch.Tensor, value: torch.Tensor, attn_metadata: AscendMetadata, kv_cache=None):
        # PrefillNoCache doesn't need key_cache, but other modes do
        if attn_metadata.attn_state != AscendAttentionState.PrefillNoCache:
            if self.key_cache is None and kv_cache is not None:
                ...
                self.key_cache, self.value_cache = kv_cache[0], kv_cache[1]
            if self.key_cache is None:
                raise RuntimeError(...)

        if attn_metadata.attn_state == AscendAttentionState.PrefillNoCache:
            block_size = 128
            block_table = None
            actual_seq_lengths_kv = attn_metadata.actual_seq_lengths_q
            if self.attn_type == AttentionType.ENCODER_DECODER:
                actual_seq_lengths_kv = torch.cumsum(attn_metadata.seq_lens, dim=0).tolist()
        elif attn_metadata.attn_state == AscendAttentionState.PrefillCacheHit:
            batch_size = attn_metadata.seq_lens.shape[0]
            block_table = attn_metadata.block_tables[:batch_size, :]
            num_block, block_size, _, _ = self.key_cache.shape  # type: ignore
            key = self.key_cache.view(num_block, block_size, -1)
            value = self.value_cache.view(num_block, block_size, -1)
            actual_seq_lengths_kv = attn_metadata.seq_lens_list
        elif attn_metadata.attn_state == AscendAttentionState.DecodeOnly:
            num_block, block_size, _, _ = self.key_cache.shape  # type: ignore
            key = self.key_cache.view(num_block, block_size, -1)
            value = self.value_cache.view(num_block, block_size, -1)
            block_table = attn_metadata.block_tables
            actual_seq_lengths_kv = attn_metadata.seq_lens_list
        # chunked prefill.
        else:
            num_block, block_size, _, _ = self.key_cache.shape  # type: ignore
            key = self.key_cache.view(num_block, block_size, -1)
            value = self.value_cache.view(num_block, block_size, -1)
            block_table = attn_metadata.block_tables
            actual_seq_lengths_kv = attn_metadata.seq_lens_list
        return key, value, block_size, block_table, actual_seq_lengths_kv
elide: lazy 初始化 key_cache 的 isinstance 形状判断（L990-L1003，与 forward 顶部同套路）
ChunkedPrefill 与 DecodeOnly 分支体一致，可合并讲

embed_excerpts.code:
def forward_fused_infer_attention(
        self,
        query: torch.Tensor,
        key: torch.Tensor,
        value: torch.Tensor,
        attn_metadata: AscendMetadata,
        output: torch.Tensor,
        kv_cache=None,
    ):
        if _EXTRA_CTX.capturing:
            ...
        passed_key = key
        key, value, block_size, block_table, actual_seq_lengths_kv = self._get_fia_params(
            key, value, attn_metadata, kv_cache
        )
        ...
        num_tokens = attn_metadata.actual_seq_lengths_q[-1]
        query = query[:num_tokens]
        if (
            attn_metadata.attn_state == AscendAttentionState.PrefillNoCache
            and self.attn_type != AttentionType.ENCODER_DECODER
        ):
            key = key[:num_tokens]
            value = value[:num_tokens]
        if self.sinks is not None:
            ...
        else:
            if not attn_metadata.causal:
                attn_output, _ = torch_npu.npu_fused_infer_attention_score(
                    query=query, key=key, value=value, block_table=block_table,
                    input_layout="TND", block_size=block_size,
                    actual_seq_lengths=attn_metadata.actual_seq_lengths_q,
                    actual_seq_lengths_kv=actual_seq_lengths_kv,
                    num_key_value_heads=self.num_kv_heads, num_heads=self.num_heads,
                    scale=self.scale, sparse_mode=0,
                )
            elif self.sliding_window is not None:
                attn_output, _ = torch_npu.npu_fused_infer_attention_score(
                    query=query, key=key, value=value, atten_mask=attn_metadata.attn_mask,
                    block_table=block_table, input_layout="TND", block_size=block_size,
                    actual_seq_lengths=attn_metadata.actual_seq_lengths_q,
                    actual_seq_lengths_kv=actual_seq_lengths_kv,
                    num_key_value_heads=self.num_kv_heads, num_heads=self.num_heads,
                    scale=self.scale, pre_tokens=self.sliding_window, next_tokens=0, sparse_mode=4,
                )
            else:
                attn_output, _ = torch_npu.npu_fused_infer_attention_score(
                    query=query, key=key, value=value, atten_mask=attn_metadata.attn_mask,
                    block_table=block_table, input_layout="TND", block_size=block_size,
                    actual_seq_lengths=attn_metadata.actual_seq_lengths_q,
                    actual_seq_lengths_kv=actual_seq_lengths_kv,
                    num_key_value_heads=self.num_kv_heads, num_heads=self.num_heads,
                    scale=self.scale, sparse_mode=3,
                )
            attn_output = attn_output.view(num_tokens, self.num_heads, self.head_size)
        output[:num_tokens] = attn_output[:num_tokens]
        return output
elide: _EXTRA_CTX.capturing 走 full_graph_fia/_v2（图捕获路径，L1057-L1065）
enable_hamming_sparse 的 reshape_and_cache_kvcomp/get_kvcomp_decode_params 分支（L1070-L1075，默认关）
self.sinks 分支：用 npu_fused_infer_attention_score_v2 + learnable_sink（L1085-L1110，attention-sink 模型专用），主线讲非 sinks 的三选一 sparse_mode（0 非因果 / 4 滑窗 / 3 因果）

embed_excerpts.code:
def full_graph_pa(
        self,
        query: torch.Tensor,
        attn_metadata: AscendMetadata,
        output: torch.Tensor | None = None,
    ):
        graph_params = get_graph_params()
        num_tokens = query.shape[0]
        if _EXTRA_CTX.capturing:
            # Get workspace from cache or calculate it if not present.
            workspace = graph_params.workspaces.get(num_tokens)
            if workspace is None:
                workspace = torch_npu._npu_paged_attention_get_workspace(
                    query=query,
                    key_cache=self.key_cache,
                    value_cache=self.value_cache,
                    num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads,
                    num_heads=self.num_heads,
                    scale_value=self.scale,
                    block_table=attn_metadata.block_tables,
                    context_lens=attn_metadata.seq_lens,
                    out=output,
                )
                update_graph_params_workspaces(num_tokens, workspace)
elide: 其后 ExternalEvent/graph_task_group_begin..end 把 _npu_paged_attention 录进 ACL 图（L947-L983）——只取 workspace 预取这一节拍作范例，图捕获机制不展开
MLA 专用 mask（get_mla_mask/get_pcp_mla_mask/get_final_mla_mask，非本章 MHA 主线）
@singleton 装饰：mask builder 全局唯一，2048×2048 上三角缓存一次复用

key_classes.name: AscendAttentionBackend
key_classes.responsibility: vLLM AttentionBackend 的昇腾实现，@register_backend(CUSTOM, ASCEND) 注册进 backend registry；get_impl_cls/get_builder_cls 在 enable_cp() 下切到 CP 版（f7 收口）；get_kv_cache_shape 定 (2,num_blocks,block_size,num_kv_heads,head_size)；swap/copy_blocks 块搬运

key_classes.name: AscendAttentionState
key_classes.responsibility: 五态枚举：当前 batch 形态（纯 prefill 无缓存 / prefill 命中前缀 / 纯 decode / chunked prefill / 投机解码），forward_impl 据此选算子路径

key_classes.name: AscendMetadata
key_classes.responsibility: 逐层注意力元数据：attn_state + slot_mapping(token→KV 物理槽) + block_tables + seq_lens 家族 + actual_seq_lengths_q + attn_mask + 各计数；torch_npu 算子的入参容器

key_classes.name: AscendAttentionMetadataBuilder
key_classes.responsibility: 继承 AttentionMetadataBuilder[AscendMetadata]：build 从 CommonAttentionMetadata 拆 decode/prefill、取 slot_mapping/block_table、装 attn_mask、H2D query_start_loc → AscendMetadata；build_for_graph_capture 造图捕获 dummy；reorder_batch_threshold = 1(+spec tokens)

key_classes.name: AscendAttentionBackendImpl
key_classes.responsibility: 继承 AttentionImpl：forward → reshape_and_cache 写 KV → forward_impl 按 attn_state 分流到 forward_paged_attention(_npu_paged_attention) 或 forward_fused_infer_attention(npu_fused_infer_attention_score[_v2])；非 MLA 模型主路径

key_classes.name: AscendC8AttentionBackendImpl
key_classes.responsibility: INT8 KV 量化(C8/QuaRot)子类：量化 K/V 写 NZ 5D paged cache(npu_scatter_pa_kv_cache)，decode 走 FIA V1 BNSD + perchannel antiquant，prefill gather+dequant。减法候选/选讲，不喧宾夺主

key_classes.name: AttentionMaskBuilder
key_classes.responsibility: @singleton mask 工厂：get_attention_mask 给 MHA 返回 2048×2048 上三角 splitfuse mask（int8），pooling 给 bool mask；MLA mask 另列

key_classes.name: DeviceOperator(BaseDeviceAdaptor)
key_classes.responsibility: 按设备型号选的算子适配器；reshape_and_cache 落到 torch_npu._npu_reshape_and_cache 把新算 K/V 按 slot_mapping 写回分页 cache

data_flow: 1. 选后端/实现：AscendAttentionBackend.get_impl_cls()/get_builder_cls() —— enable_cp() 为假返回 AscendAttentionBackendImpl/Builder（主线）；为真返回 CP 版（f7 收口，CP 组排布回指 ch08）

2. 建元数据（每步前向一次，逐层共享）：AscendAttentionMetadataBuilder.build → split_decodes_and_prefills 在已重排 batch 上找 decode|prefill 分界 → 取 block_table、slot_mapping[:num_actual_tokens]、seq_lens → attn_mask_builder.get_attention_mask → query_start_loc pin_memory().to(device) H2D → 组 AscendMetadata（attn_state 由上游 model runner 定）
3. 前向入口 forward：从 kv_cache 懒初始化 self.key_cache/value_cache → 若 key/value 非空，reshape_and_cache 写 KV
4. 写 KV：reshape_and_cache → DeviceOperator.reshape_and_cache → torch_npu._npu_reshape_and_cache(key,value,key_cache,value_cache,slot_indices=slot_mapping) 把本步新算 K/V 按 slot 写进分页 cache

5. 状态分流 forward_impl：若 attn_state==DecodeOnly 且 using_paged_attention(num_tokens)（无 spec、非 A5、CUDAGraph FULL_DECODE_ONLY、shape 命中 pa_shape_list）且无滑窗 → forward_paged_attention；否则 → forward_fused_infer_attention

6a. paged 路径 forward_paged_attention：torch_npu._npu_paged_attention(query,key_cache,value_cache,...,block_table=block_tables,context_lens=seq_lens,out=output)（图捕获下先 _npu_paged_attention_get_workspace 预取 workspace）

6b. fused 路径 forward_fused_infer_attention：_get_fia_params 按五态整理 key/value(view num_block,block_size,-1)/block_size/block_table/actual_seq_lengths_kv → 非因果 sparse_mode=0 / 滑窗 sparse_mode=4 / 因果 sparse_mode=3 调 torch_npu.npu_fused_infer_attention_score(input_layout=TND)（sinks 模型走 _v2 + learnable_sink）

design_decisions.decision: 用一台五态机（AscendAttentionState）做单一分流轴
design_decisions.why: 每态对应一种 batch 形态——PrefillNoCache=纯新 prefill 无历史 KV（block_table=None，KV 即本步算的）/ PrefillCacheHit=带前缀缓存的 prefill（读 paged cache）/ DecodeOnly=纯单 token 解码 / ChunkedPrefill=分块 prefill 与 decode 混批 / SpecDecoding=投机解码（每 req 多 token）。状态决定 _get_fia_params 怎么取 KV 和 forward_impl 走哪条算子

design_decisions.decision: 把 vLLM FlashAttention 的 CUDA 内核逐一换成 torch_npu 算子
design_decisions.why: 基座 vllm/v1/attention/backends/flash_attn.py 用 flash_attn_varlen_func（前向）+ reshape_and_cache_flash（写 KV）；昇腾无这些 CUDA 内核，故 paged 解码换 _npu_paged_attention、融合 prefill/混批换 npu_fused_infer_attention_score(_v2)、写 KV 换 _npu_reshape_and_cache。后端契约（AttentionBackend/Builder/Impl）不变，只换内核——这正是 OOT 插件『顶替内核不改引擎』的范式

design_decisions.decision: decode 用 paged、prefill/混批用 fused-infer 两条算子
design_decisions.why: 纯解码每序列 1 个 query token、KV 全在分页 cache → _npu_paged_attention 直接吃 block_table+context_lens 最省；prefill/chunked 有变长 query 段、需 attn_mask 与 TND 变长布局 → npu_fused_infer_attention_score 一把融合 QK^T·softmax·PV。但 paged 路径还要满足 using_paged_attention 的多重门槛（FULL_DECODE_ONLY 图模式 + shape 命中 + 非 spec/A5 + 无滑窗），否则 decode 也回落 fused

design_decisions.decision: workspace 预取——NPU 算子的特有节拍
design_decisions.why: torch_npu 的 paged/fused-infer 算子需要外部预分配的 workspace 显存；图捕获/replay 路径先调 _npu_paged_attention_get_workspace / _npu_fused_infer_attention_score_get_max_workspace 量出大小并缓存（graph_params.workspaces[num_tokens]），再把真正算子录进 ACL 图。这是 CUDA flash 内核没有的一步

design_decisions.decision: sparse_mode 编码因果/滑窗/全连接，统一 TND 变长布局
design_decisions.why: npu_fused_infer_attention_score 用 sparse_mode 选 mask 语义：0=不加 mask（非因果，如双向/encoder）、3=因果下三角、4=滑动窗口（配 pre_tokens=window）。query 用 TND（Token-Num heads-Dim）变长打平布局，actual_seq_lengths_q/kv 给出每序列边界——对应 vLLM 的 cu_seqlens 变长 flash

design_decisions.decision: attn_mask 单例 + 2048×2048 上三角缓存复用
design_decisions.why: AttentionMaskBuilder 是 @singleton，splitfuse mask 一次造好 torch.triu(ones(2048,2048),1).int8 全程复用，避免每步重建；按需扩容（get_attn_mask 在 max_seq_len 超缓存时重算）

design_decisions.decision: build 里多次 H2D 与 .tolist() 是已知的冗余/技术债
design_decisions.why: build 把 query_start_loc 重新 pin_memory H2D（源码 TODO 自承『device 上已有一份』），并把 seq_lens/query_start_loc 反复 .tolist() 成 Python list 喂算子；AscendMetadata dataclass 注释也自承 seq_lens 家族字段冗余待统一。读者需知这是工程现状而非设计精华

theory.topic: 五态 × batch 形态映射
theory.detail: decode_threshold = 1 + num_speculative_tokens（≤16，受 npu_fused_infer_attention_score TND 布局 16 限制）。split_decodes_and_prefills 在已按 query_len 重排的 batch 上，用 query_lens > decode_threshold 找第一个 prefill 的下标 first_prefill → num_decodes=first_prefill，前 first_prefill 个 token-block 是 decode 段、其后是 prefill 段。状态本身由上游 model runner 据 batch 是否含 prefill/是否 spec/是否前缀命中设好，传进 common_attn_metadata.attn_state

theory.topic: slot_mapping 的物理寻址（回指 ch16/ch17）
theory.detail: slot_mapping[i] = 第 i 个 token 要写进的全局物理槽号；block_id = slot // block_size，块内偏移 = slot % block_size。KV cache 形状 (2,num_blocks,block_size,num_kv_heads,head_size)，_npu_reshape_and_cache 按 slot_indices 把 [num_tokens,num_kv_heads,head_size] 的新 K/V 散写进对应槽。block_table[req] 给出该序列占用的物理块号列表，paged/fused 算子据此 gather 历史 KV

theory.topic: TND 变长布局与 cu_seqlens 等价
theory.detail: TND = 把一个 batch 里所有序列的 token 沿轴 0 打平（T=Σ序列长），actual_seq_lengths_q（= query_start_loc[1:]）给出各序列在打平轴上的累积右边界，等价于 vLLM flash 的 cu_seqlens_q/k。这让一个算子调用处理整批变长序列而无需 padding 到等长

vLLM CUDA 线 → 昇腾 NPU 线：flash_attn_varlen_func（变长前向）→ npu_fused_infer_attention_score(_v2)（prefill/混批，TND）+ _npu_paged_attention（纯 decode，分页）；reshape_and_cache_flash（写 KV）→ _npu_reshape_and_cache；workspace 在 CUDA 侧由内核内部管理，NPU 侧需 *_get_workspace / *_get_max_workspace 显式预取

delete.what: update_graph_params 静态方法整体（L400-L673）及 full_graph_fia/full_graph_fia_v2/full_graph_pa 的图录制体（L680-L920 中除 workspace 预取范例外的 ExternalEvent/graph_task_group/attn_params 录制逻辑）
delete.why_safe: 这些是 ACL 图捕获/replay 的参数更新与录制路径（_EXTRA_CTX.capturing/draft model 才进）；eager 主前向 forward_impl→forward_paged/fused 不经过它们。精简版只保留 forward_paged_attention 里 _EXTRA_CTX.capturing→full_graph_pa 的一处『workspace 预取节拍』范例，删除其余图机制不影响可读控制流的正确性

delete.what: AscendC8AttentionBackendImpl 整个子类及其私有方法（_nz_5d_view/_prepare_c8_scales/_dequant_paged_kv_to_dense/_quantize_kv_to_int8/_forward_c8_decode/_forward_c8_chunked_prefill/_forward_c8_fused_infer_attention/_reshape_and_cache，L1346-L1783）
delete.why_safe: C8 INT8 KV 量化是独立特性子类，经 kv_c8.py 的 class surgery 才激活；标准 MHA 主路径不走它。作为减法候选/选讲，正文点名其存在与定位即可，精简版可整段删除而不破坏 AscendAttentionBackendImpl 的主控制流

delete.what: enable_hamming_sparse / kvcomp 分支（forward L1303-1304、forward_fused_infer_attention L1070-L1075、full_graph_fia L691-L696 的 reshape_and_cache_kvcomp/get_kvcomp_decode_params）
delete.why_safe: hamming 稀疏注意力默认关（is_enable_hamming_sparse() 为假），属可选稀疏特性；删后主路径 query/key/value 走默认分支，控制流不变

delete.what: self.sinks 分支（forward_fused_infer_attention L1085-L1110 的 npu_fused_infer_attention_score_v2 + learnable_sink、full_graph_fia_v2 整体）与 sinks 相关 update 路径
delete.why_safe: attention-sink（如 gpt-oss）专用；标准 MHA 模型 self.sinks=None，走 else 分支的 npu_fused_infer_attention_score 三选一（sparse_mode 0/4/3）。精简版保留非 sinks 主分支即可

delete.what: PCP/DCP 相关字段与分支（AscendMetadata.prefill/decode_meta/num_actual_tokens_pcp_padded、split_decodes_and_prefills 的 query_lens_pcp_full 分支、CP 版 impl/builder 的 import）
delete.why_safe: CP（上下文并行）运行期分流由 enable_cp() 控制，本章只在 get_impl_cls/get_builder_cls 处『点名收口 f7』，CP attention 算子在 context_parallel/ 子模块、非本章主线。精简版保留 enable_cp() 假分支（主线），删 CP 真分支体不影响标准路径

delete.what: swap_blocks/copy_blocks（L110-L136）、_forward_encoder_attention 与 pooling 分支（L1187-L1205, L1334-L1337）、is_kv_producer 的 reshape_cache_event 录制（L1239-1240,1254-1255）
delete.why_safe: 块搬运/拷贝是 KV cache 管理辅助（preemption/CoW）、encoder/pooling 是非自回归模型分支、reshape_cache_event 是 disaggregated PD 的 KV 传输同步——均非标准 MHA 自回归解码主线，删后 forward→reshape_and_cache→forward_impl 主控制流完整

must_keep.why: 五态机本体，全章立意；五个成员名 PrefillNoCache/PrefillCacheHit/DecodeOnly/ChunkedPrefill/SpecDecoding 必须出现
读者需理解纯新 prefill 无历史 KV（block_table=None）这一态

纯解码态，paged 路径的唯一触发态
分块 prefill 与 decode 混批态，AscendMetadata 默认态
投机解码态，每 req 多 token，decode_threshold>1
算子入参容器，slot_mapping/block_tables/seq_lens/attn_state 都在其上，writer 需逐字段讲
ch18 选定后端，本章是其 impl_cls 的所在
f7 收口点：enable_cp() 分流到 CP 版 impl
f7 收口点：enable_cp() 分流到 CP 版 builder
定义 (2,num_blocks,block_size,num_kv_heads,head_size)，slot_mapping 寻址的基础
运行期 CP 分流判据（prefill/decode_context_parallel_size>1），f7 回收的开关
元数据装配类，build/build_for_graph_capture 在其上
元数据装配主方法：拆批+slot_mapping+block_table+mask+H2D
图捕获分支，章纲明确要求讲
把一批拆成 decode/prefill 段的核心函数，返回四元组
token→KV 物理槽映射，回指 ch16/ch17，writer 需讲清寻址
每序列物理块号列表，paged/fused 算子据此 gather 历史 KV
本章主角类（非 MLA 主路径 impl）
前向入口：写 KV → forward_impl
状态分流核心：DecodeOnly+paged 条件 vs fused
KV 写入方法，章纲第(4)点
decode/paged 算子路径
prefill/融合算子路径
按五态整理 KV/block_table/seq_lens 的分流函数，状态机的另一半
paged 路径的多门槛判据（FULL_DECODE_ONLY/shape/非 spec-A5/无滑窗）
reshape_and_cache 经它落到 torch_npu 算子
减法候选，正文需点名其存在与定位（选讲）

diagram_plan.name: ch19-roadmap
diagram_plan.spec: 复用 book/assets/roadmap/roadmap.py：高亮『attention 子系统 → AscendAttentionBackendImpl（标准 MHA）』节点；前承 ch18（AscendAttentionBackend 选定/注册），后接 ch20（MLA 后端）；侧标 f7 回收（enable_cp 分流）

diagram_plan.name: ch19-state-machine
diagram_plan.spec: 五态机分流表：行=五态（PrefillNoCache/PrefillCacheHit/DecodeOnly/ChunkedPrefill/SpecDecoding），列=[batch 形态一句话 | block_table 来源 | KV 来源（本步算 vs paged cache）| forward_impl 落点（paged vs fused）| sparse_mode]。突出 DecodeOnly 是唯一可能走 forward_paged_attention 的态（还需 using_paged_attention 四门槛 + 无滑窗），其余皆 fused

diagram_plan.name: ch19-kernel-swap
diagram_plan.spec: 左列 vLLM CUDA 线（flash_attn_varlen_func / reshape_and_cache_flash / 内核内部 workspace），右列昇腾 NPU 线（npu_fused_infer_attention_score(_v2) + _npu_paged_attention / _npu_reshape_and_cache / *_get_workspace 预取）；箭头逐一对应。底部标注：后端契约 AttentionBackend/Builder/Impl 不变，只换内核

diagram_plan.name: ch19-forward-flow
diagram_plan.spec: 前向数据流：query/key/value → reshape_and_cache(_npu_reshape_and_cache 按 slot_mapping 写分页 cache) → forward_impl 菱形判定（attn_state==DecodeOnly && using_paged_attention && sliding_window is None?）→ 是→forward_paged_attention(_npu_paged_attention) / 否→forward_fused_infer_attention(_get_fia_params→npu_fused_infer_attention_score) → output[:num_tokens]。侧注 workspace 预取节拍（图捕获路径）

diagram_plan.name: ch19-slot-mapping
diagram_plan.kind: svg-diagram (memory layout, 可选/复用 ch16-17 风格)
diagram_plan.spec: slot_mapping 物理寻址：KV cache (2,num_blocks,block_size,...) → slot=35,block_size=16 → block 2 第 3 槽；block_table[req] 列出该序列物理块号。回指 ch16/ch17，避免重复细节，仅作本章 KV 写入/读取的锚

recover.summary: CP（PCP/DCP）组排布在 ch08 讲清（transpose(3,4) 重排、不增 world_size）；attention 篇运行期 enable_cp() 分流引用本章的 CP 组排布
recover.recover_how: 本章在 AscendAttentionBackend.get_impl_cls/get_builder_cls 处点出：enable_cp()（utils.py:L58-L61，prefill/decode_context_parallel_size>1）为真时切到 CP 版 AscendAttentionCPImpl/Builder，AscendMetadata 带 pcp(prefill)/dcp(decode_meta) 字段——运行期 enable_cp() 分流在此收口；CP 组排布本身回指 ch08，深入的 CP attention 算子在 context_parallel/ 子模块、非本章主线（如实点出、不展开）
